issues.message: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.

actual.error: rising_spiral direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 4.94083 mm but at least 10.5 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.4, 0.45, 0.25, 0.5, 0.4, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance; s_curve_section direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 9.8979 mm but at least 10.5 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.5, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance; sequential heading contradiction at outward_bend: turn.plane_normal must be perpendicular to the incoming tangent; incoming heading is [0.927837, -0.037113, 0.371135] and absolute dot product is 0.0371135

next_actions: Fix INTENT_EXTRACTION_FAILED: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.
